title: Velvety Indulgent Malaysian Paella Rice
description: A tangy, velvety, and indulgent Malaysian dish featuring a flavorful paella rice base, topped with a delicious nuka-pickle.
instructions: Heat coconut oil in a large paella pan over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken breast and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the fish sauce, nuka-pickle, sambal oelek, and fish stock. Stir well.
Add the paella rice to the pan and stir to coat with the flavorful mixture.
Add the coconut milk and bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and cook, covered, for 20 minutes.
Remove from heat and let rest for 5 minutes.

Note: To make nuka-pickle, combine 1 cup of thinly sliced daikon, 1/2 cup of thinly sliced cucumber, and 2 tablespoons of fish sauce in a bowl. Let sit at room temperature for 30 minutes, then refrigerate until chilled.
